name: Order a radon gas test kit

pages.title: Order a radon home test kit

components.name: qwplwo
components.content:
Use this service to order a radon gas test kit for your home.

This service costs £52.80 including VAT.

Ordering a kit takes around 5 minutes. It may take up to 10 working days after you order for the kit to be sent.

The kit contains two detectors. one for the living area and one for the bedroom of a residential property.

It doesn't matter how big the home is or how many rooms there are. The detectors just need to be placed in any regularly used living area and bedroom.

Once your kit arrives, we'll send you instructions on how to carry out the test.

You'll get the results and advice on what to do next within 20 working days after you return the kit.

Important information before you continue

The test will not be valid if:

components.name: VDzNQL
components.title: The test will not be valid if

components.name: gkopdo
components.content:
This is because the way people live in a home can affect the radon level. For example. how often they open windows and doors, or how they heat the house.

Before you start

You'll need your:
